Maxxim × Jewell
Brand Identity Guidelines · Edition 03 · 2026

The human at the wheel.

Maxxim is the commercialisation engine that runs Jewell's proven, gated 3D Process at AI speed, with an accountable human at every gate. This is the visual and verbal system that makes the method legible: calm, credible, high-contrast, and built to be trusted with the sign-off.

Maxxim
SUBJECT: city at dusk, aerial GRADE: Signal Blue #2D5BFF MOOD: premium, calm, capable RULE: no people, no neon wash
01

Brand at a glance

The why · The trust gap

Agencies have the human without the speed. AI tools have the speed without the human. We exist to be fast, accountable and method-backed at the same time.

Finished, owned outcomes. Never spectacle.
Brand essence
The human at the wheel.

The proven method, run by a human, at AI speed. Partner-facing alternative: the engine behind the partner.

Positioning, one line

The only AI-powered marketing platform combining a proven method, a named human at every gate, and a partner community — finished, owned, delivered at speed.

80 / 20
AI runs the repeatable 80%. The human owns the 20% clients pay for.
3D + Deepen
Discover, Design, Deploy — then the compounding loop.
3
Named specialists: Max, Sal, Pip. The method made visible.
2
Owners, Clent and Raef. No board. A human stands behind it.
V1
A human stands behind it

Every output carries a named person's accountability.

V2
Finished, not busy

Launched outcomes and owned assets, not hours or dashboards.

V3
The client owns it

Assets owned outright, on their own domain, unlockable.

V4
Keep the gate

No phase proceeds until the prior one is signed off.

V5
Stronger together

A community's judgement beats a lone operator's.

02

Brand story

Maxxim exists for the Capacity-Capped Operator: the trusted partner who can win the work and own the relationship, but cannot deliver agency-grade growth repeatably. Behind that partner, Maxxim runs Jewell's proven, gated 3D Process at AI speed.

The method is 3D plus Deepen: Discover, then Design, then Deploy, then the compounding loop once the engine is live. The gate is the quality bar, and the product enforces it — creative unlocks only as its briefs exist and a logo is locked.

Human in the loop is the point, not a limitation. AI carries the repeatable volume; the human holds trust, taste and judgement, which is where quality is decided. The brand sells finished, owned outcomes, so the visual system is disciplined and high-contrast: it earns trust through legibility and restraint, not decoration.

Jewell, a 35-year operator, now runs the whole model in market — the live proof that a capacity-capped operator becomes a scaled partner rather than a stuck one.

The seam the brand makes legible
20%HUMAN · trust, taste, judgement
80%MACHINE · the repeatable volume, human-checked at every gate

Jewell enters and owns the client. Discover is always human. Design and Deploy hand off to the Maxxim engine at scale once the judgement work is set. Jewell is the name on the door; Maxxim is the engine behind it. The visual system keeps the human the hero.

Archetype · a weighted blend
Primary archetype
Sage

Wise, trustworthy, analytical, evidence-led, never hyperbolic. Authority from a method proven over years — and a refusal to dress plumbing up as the product.

Supporting archetype
Creator

Structured, methodical, a builder of real things. Ties the brand to tangible, launched outcomes. Deliberately not the Magician, and not the Hero.

03

Logo system

A typographic combination mark: the Maxxim wordmark in Poppins, paired with the gated-M monogram. A platform and a standard, not a mascot. The Blue Frog is permanently removed and must never be reintroduced.

Maxxim
Maxxim
Horizontal lockupDefault. Website, proposals, email signature. Min 120px / 24mm.
Maxxim
Reversed (inverse)White knockout on Signal Blue or dark grounds. Never on light fields.
Icon onlyFavicon, app icon, avatar. 16px hard floor, designed for directly.

Clear space & minimum size

  • Protect the mark with clear space equal to x, the cap-height of the wordmark, on all sides.
  • Below 120px wide, drop the wordmark and use the icon alone.
VariantScreenPrint
Horizontal lockup120px24mm
Stacked lockup80px18mm
Icon only16px floorflat, no effects

Backgrounds & inverse rules

  • On white or light: primary mark in Signal Blue.
  • On Signal Blue or dark: reversed mark knocked out in white.
  • On busy or photographic fields: place the mark on a solid Signal Blue or white holding shape — never directly over busy detail.
  • Where colour is unavailable: single-colour mono mark in Ink, kept flat.
3.5 · Misuse — six things the mark never does
Maxxim
✕Stretched or skewed
Maxxim
✕Blue on blue, no contrast
Maxxim
✕White on white, no contrast
Maxxim
✕Rotated
Maxxim
✕Shadow, glow or gradient
Maxxim+ mascot
✕Any animal or mascot alongside
04

Colour

Signal Blue is the one locked brand colour, and it leads. Blue is the colour of trust, reliability and competence — the ground the trust gap is fought on — and the electric saturation signals AI speed. "Signal" means clarity over noise.

Primary · Signal Blue
#2D5BFF
LOCKED
RGB
45 / 91 / 255
CMYK
82 / 64 / 0 / 0
PANTONE
2727 C
Brand fields, positive mark on white, reverse field for the white knockout, CTAs, links, accents. It leads everywhere. The Signal name reinforces clarity over noise.
Ink · #0A0A0A
RGB 10/10/10 · CMYK 0/0/0/96 · Neutral Black C
Primary text, mono mark, dark ground for the reversed white mark.
White · #FFFFFF
RGB 255/255/255
Primary background. The reversed mark knocked out of blue or dark.
Mist · #F5F6F8
RGB 245/246/248
Light neutral surfaces, proposal covers, light end-client contexts.
Neutrals are recommended supporting colours, not locked.
To confirm: the CMYK and Pantone values for Signal Blue are working approximations, to be locked at production stage against printed proofs. Hex and RGB are exact.
05

Typography

Poppins is the locked typeface — a geometric sans: modern, clean, even, approachable without being playful. One family carries the whole system. Weight and hierarchy create emphasis, not ornament.

Body & UI · running text
Poppins
Aa Bb Cc Dd Ee · 1234567890 · & ? !
Light 300Regular 400Medium 500SemiBold 600Bold 700
Display · titles & headlines
Poppins
The same family, heavier cuts. No second typeface, ever.
SemiBold 600Bold 700Tracking −2 to −3%
Display / HeroBold · 64–72pt · covers
H1 Section headingSemiBold · 40–48pt
H2 Sub-section headingMedium · 28–32pt
H3 Panel headingSemiBold · 20–22pt
Body copy, the running text of the documentRegular · 16–18pt
Caption and data label textRegular · 12–14pt
Small and legal fine printLight · 10–12pt
Specimen
The proven method, run by a human, at AI speed.
Poppins Light through Bold — one family carries the whole system.
MAXXIM
Poppins Bold · tracking +200 · Signal Blue on white

Type colour rules

  • Body on white: Ink #0A0A0A
  • Headlines on white: Ink or Signal Blue
  • Any text on Signal Blue: White only

Never

  • Coloured type in non-brand hues.
  • Script or decorative fonts alongside Poppins.
06

Voice & tone

Plain. Precise. Accountable. Claims are sized to the proof, the human is named, and what is open is flagged as open. The machine is never the hero.

DIMENSION
MORE LIKE THIS ✓
LESS LIKE THIS ✗
Confidence
Assured and evidence-backed. Claims are sized to the proof.
Boastful or hyperbolic. Claims outrun the evidence.
Formality
Plain operator-to-operator. Short sentences, exact words.
Stiff corporate jargon, or loose and chatty filler.
Accountability
Names the human and shows the gate. The human is the hero.
Faceless and automated. The machine is the hero.
Honesty
States what is locked, flags what is open, no false certainty.
Papering over open questions with invented precision.
Confidence
DO

The method has run with real clients for years. Pottsville is launched, and the client owns it. Jewell now runs the whole model in market.

DON'T

Maxxim is the revolutionary AI platform transforming marketing forever.

Formality
DO

AI runs the repeatable 80 percent at speed. You own the 20 percent clients pay for.

DON'T

Our synergistic end-to-end solution leverages cutting-edge artificial intelligence to optimise outcomes.

Accountability
DO

A named human signs off at every gate, so the work is something you can stand behind.

DON'T

Our AI handles everything automatically, no human needed.

Style rules
›Australian English throughout
›No em dashes. Use commas or full stops instead
›No exclamation marks. The claim carries the emphasis
›Short sentences over complex constructions
›Name the specialists, Max, Sal and Pip, to make the engine concrete. They are the method, not the hero
Channel tone
Website / partner hub
Fullest Sage expression. Lead with position then proof.
Community sessions
Warmer, more reciprocal. Discovery and alignment, not pitch.
End-client copy (via partners)
Simpler, outcome-led. Done for you, owned by you, live in days.
Proposals / gate sign-offs
Most formal and precise. Separate locked from open explicitly.
Social / short form
Sage compressed. One sharp, true claim. No exclamation marks.
07

The specialists

Max. Sal. Pip. The method made visible. Three named specialists, each a process — the branded expression of the engine, always subordinate to the accountable human.

Max
Words + Strategy · Claude Cowork

Max runs the repeatable content and strategy work: briefs, copy decks, research synthesis, discovery documents. Max is the words behind the partner.

Sal
Pixels + Design · Design Studio

Sal does the design work: brand guidelines, site builds, visual assets, video. Sal is the eye behind the partner.

Pip
Social · Social Studio

Pip runs social: platforms, posts, cadences — drafting and, on approval, publishing. Pip is the voice in the feed.

The specialists are how the method is shown working. They are never presented as separate products. The accountable human is always the partner.
08

Imagery & art direction

Real over illustrated. Outcome over abstract. Photorealistic, editorial, Signal Blue led.

The brand sells finished, owned outcomes. Imagery must show real launched work and real people accountable for it — the live site on a browser, the named partner at the table — not stock AI abstractions of glowing brains and circuit boards. Abstract AI imagery undercuts the human-at-the-wheel position.
CATEGORY 1
The Partner at Work

Real operators doing skilled, focused work. Candid, natural light, never posed.

CATEGORY 2
The Finished Outcome

Actual digital deliverables. Live websites in a browser, proposal documents, a phone showing a post.

CATEGORY 3
The Table / Community

Partners together. A meeting at a table, people reviewing shared work. Warm and collaborative.

✕Glowing brains, neural networks, circuit-board overlays
✕Robotic hands or AI robot imagery
✕Heavily posed corporate stock photography
✕Illustrated or cartoon icons as hero images
✕Purple, teal or neon colour washes — they undercut Signal Blue's leadership
When in doubt: choose the photograph that shows a real person accountable for real, finished work.
Photography board · Edition 03
09

Brand architecture

Two brands, one seam. The partner is always the front door.

The name on the door
Jewell

The partner brand. Jewell enters and owns the client relationship, runs the always-human Discover phase, and signs off every gate. A 35-year operator now running the full model in market — the live proof of the seam. Jewell's external lead word is locked: growth.

The engine behind it
Maxxim

The commercialisation engine. Runs Design and Deploy at scale once the judgement work is set, through Max, Sal and Pip. Maxxim is named and showable, but always subordinate to the accountable human. Maxxim's own one-word category lead remains open.

Proof clearance

Pottsville Acupuncture is the only cleared public Maxxim case study. The Jewell partner site is a reference for how the seam reads, but Jewell's named client results stay under Jewell's banner and are never re-used as Maxxim's public proof.

10

Application examples

The system in the world, with the mark placed correctly. The layout, colour and type are the brand.
